confidence_summary.reason: Colors and radius are verified from CSS variables; typography is partially inferred from theme files and screenshots; some component variants are missing. Label typography is inferred from rendered output, not directly from source.

components.name: button-primary
components.observed_behavior: Solid primary button with white text and medium radius.

components.name: card
components.observed_behavior: Surface-colored container with large radius and generous padding. Used for invoice summaries, usage charts, plan comparison panels.

layout.pattern: Two-column page shell with a sticky left nav and scrollable content area.
Content max width ~960px for main panels.

accessibility.pattern: Visible focus states appear in screenshots, but keyboard support is not verified from code.

inferences: Use a restrained SaaS palette with one dominant primary accent.
Keep the interface dense enough for finance workflows without becoming cramped.
Inter is the primary body font based on theme file and screenshot evidence.
assumptions: Inter is the primary body font because it appears in the theme and screenshots, but the exact fallback stack is not fully verified.
Label typography (14px/500) is inferred from rendered nav links and button labels, not from explicit theme configuration.
missing_information: Verified component variants for plan cards, tables, and empty states are missing.
Motion and elevation tokens are not explicitly declared in the repository.
Hover and active states for buttons and links are not documented.
Dark mode support status is unknown.
recommended_next_steps: Inspect the table component source for spacing and hover states.
Confirm whether dark mode is supported before finalizing color contrast tokens.
Add explicit motion tokens if animations are part of the product experience.
Verify the exact Inter fallback stack by inspecting computed styles.
